name: seo-grader
description: Complete SEO strategy in a box for startup founders. Point it at your website — get back a site audit, competitive analysis, and 100+ post ideas across 5-8 pillars with production-ready briefs (keyword metrics, outlines, CTAs) you can hand to a writer. Rejects keywords that dilute your positioning, scores every idea by distance from revenue, and builds a phased publishing roadmap so the first post you publish is the one most likely to drive pipeline. Works out of the box; prompts for DataForSEO API key to unlock precise search volume and difficulty scores.
